request_payload.exposure_text: Did you know that foreign tech companies now control 72% of our critical infrastructure? While politicians talk about 'strategic autonomy,' they're letting our national security slip through their fingers. My neighbor lost their job when a foreign-owned plant shut down suddenly - no warning, no consultation. We can't keep trusting outsiders with our future. It's time to demand real independence in defense and tech. #TakeBackControl #StrategicAutonomy
